reasoning_content:
Let me check what the issue is. The problem is that the line markers specify the line number in the source file, so we should use that directly instead of incrementing. Let me look at the preprocessed file again to understand the format better.

The line marker format is:
```
# linenum filename flags
```

So when we see `# 1 "/workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c" 2`, it means the next line is line 1 of the source file.

The issue is that I'm incrementing currentSourceLine after each code line, but the line markers already tell us what line number we're at. Let me fix this.

tool_call.name: file_editor
